name: cashsnap_real_target_matrix_v1
mission: Phone/browser USD+KHR banknote denomination counting from casual retail photos.

conditions.success_gate: no material regression versus current clean-validation baseline

conditions.real_benchmark: scoreable shop-overlap draft labels plus future reviewed captures
conditions.success_gate: improve same-class recall without increasing count overprediction

conditions.real_benchmark: reviewed partial/overlap captures, never synthetic validation alone
conditions.success_gate: bounded count error and fewer KHR_5000_to_KHR_10000 confusions

conditions.real_benchmark: data/real_fan_benchmark/ for stress only plus future rights-clear phone fan captures
conditions.success_gate: real fan same-class and count metrics improve over no-synthetic and matched 2.5D baselines
fragment evidence improves identification while fusion preserves physical counts

conditions.real_benchmark: reviewed thin/edge captures, especially KHR_5000 and KHR_20000
conditions.success_gate: denomination ID improves on human-identifiable slivers without broad false positives

conditions.real_benchmark: reviewed old/common KHR partial focus queues
conditions.success_gate: reduce old/common KHR class swaps without harming clean validation

conditions.real_benchmark: reviewed phone captures containing USD plus KHR_50000 and common KHR in one stack/overlap scene
conditions.success_gate: mixed USD+KHR rare/common stack probes improve or preserve protected real validation versus matched class-mix and row-count controls
fusion does not merge separate physical notes of the same class

conditions.real_benchmark: reviewed backgrounds, receipts, wallets, cards, hands, and shop clutter
conditions.success_gate: false positives remain bounded on browser guard cases and clean backgrounds
promote only after v1 overlap/fan gates improve
do not add to CashSnap phase 1
